brief.rationale: GLP-1 subscribers want satiating, protein-forward dinners. Maya's tandoori cauliflower steak hits 18g protein at 380 cal — and the tone leads with the dish, not the diet, per segment constraints.

email.subject_b: Maya's tandoori cauliflower lands Tuesday — early access
email.body: Maya's tandoori cauliflower steak is here, {{first_name}} — and it's not asking for permission. Smoke, char, the kind of coconut-yogurt finish that makes the fork work overtime. Not a kit. Just dinner — already cooked by a James Beard alum who lives for the mustard-oil sizzle. Ready in two minutes. Full at four. No takeout night required, and no diet-shaped tradeoffs either. [Add to plan]({{short_url}})

sms.body: Hey {{first_name}} — Maya's tandoori cauliflower steak just landed. Smoke, char, done in 2. Tap → {{short_url}}

push.title: Maya's cauliflower steak just landed
push.body: Tap to add it before Sunday's cutoff.

brief.send_time_recommendation: 2026-05-26T17:00:00Z — Launch evening, peak inbox open-rate window for the GLP-1 cohort.
